hero.title: Find Your Perfect Basecamp
hero.subtitle: Discover curated stays in the world's most extraordinary wild places

search.emptyParks: No parks available for this region

sections.basecampsDesc: Handpicked lodges and camps in the heart of India's most pristine wildlife reserves. Each property selected for its commitment to conservation, exceptional naturalist guides, and authentic safari experiences.
sections.featuredLodgesDesc: Handpicked sanctuaries that combine luxury with authentic wilderness
sections.fieldNotesDesc: Dispatches from the wild. Technical reports, sighting logs, and conservation stories from our network of naturalists.
sections.expertlyVettedDesc: We inhabit every sanctuary in our collection. Each is personally audited for ethics and narrative depth.
sections.narrativeDrivenDesc: We curate stays that offer more than a room—they offer a deeper connection to the terrain's story.
sections.seamlessBookingDesc: Complex logistics in wild places handled with precision. We guide your confidence from departure to return.
sections.foundingCollectionDesc: A curation of our most soul-stirring stays to get you started.
sections.guidedAdventuresDesc: Complete your journey with a Junglore Expedition. Expertly led tours through the heart of the wild.
sections.latestFieldNotesDesc: Expert insights, stories from the ground, and wildlife photography tips.

houseOfJunglore.label: Lifestyle Artifacts
houseOfJunglore.heading: HOUSE OF JUNGLORE.
houseOfJunglore.description: Gear for the wild, artifacts for the soul. Explore our collection of sustainable safari essentials and field gear designed for life on the move.

footer.tagline: Curated wild stays and expeditions for the conscious traveler.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get curated stories, travel tips, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.

checkout.sessionsLimit: You can add up to 20 sessions.
checkout.requestNote: No payment is taken now. Our team will check availability and contact you to confirm your stay and arrange payment.
checkout.estimateOnly: *Estimated total — final amount confirmed by our team
checkout.requestReceivedBody: Thank you! We’ve emailed you a copy of your request. Our team will confirm availability and reach out shortly.
checkout.whatsAppDesc: Receive instant updates, pre-trip guides, and direct access to your naturalist guide. Highly recommended for the best experience.
checkout.specialRequestsDesc: Dietary restrictions, accessibility needs, or special occasions
checkout.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Let us know how we can make your stay perfect...

booking.heldNotice: Your booking is being held and will expire if payment is not completed. Current payment status: {{payment}}.
booking.pendingNotice: This is a booking request awaiting confirmation. Our team will contact you to confirm availability and arrange payment.
booking.notFound: We couldn't find this booking. The booking link may be incomplete or invalid.

cancelBooking.title: Cancel this booking?
cancelBooking.message: This will cancel your reservation. Any applicable refund will be processed according to the cancellation policy. This action cannot be undone.

myBookings.label: YOUR JOURNEYS
myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.subtitle: Review and manage all of your reservations in one place.
myBookings.empty: You don't have any bookings yet. Once you reserve a stay, it will appear here.
myBookings.error: We couldn't load your bookings. Please try again.

experience.heroSubtitle: Curated wildlife experiences across India and Africa's finest wilderness reserves.
experience.dawnDesc: Witness the wilderness awaken as you track predators and herbivores during their most active hours. From Bengal tigers in Indian reserves to African lions on the savannah.
experience.trackingDesc: Learn from experienced naturalists who read the forest like a book. Identify pugmarks, alarm calls, and behavioral patterns of leopards, elephants, rhinos, and more.
experience.bushDiningDesc: Savor authentic local cuisines in stunning natural settings. From traditional Indian dishes to African-inspired menus, every meal celebrates regional heritage.
experience.nightDesc: Campfire stories under star-studded skies, night safaris to spot nocturnal wildlife, and the symphony of the wilderness after sunset.
experience.momentsSubtitle: We don't just book rooms. We architect experiences that engage every sense.
experience.ctaSubtitle: Let us curate a bespoke itinerary that matches your rhythm of the wild.

errors.network: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.serverGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

profile.title: Account Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your contact details and preferences.

errors.firstName: First name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.lastName: Last name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.phone: Enter a phone number with 7 to 15 digits.

park.lodgesEmpty: No lodges found in this park yet.

resetPassword.imageSubtitle: You're one step away from getting back to planning your next wild adventure.
resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account below.
resetPassword.errorLength: Password must be between 8 and 128 characters.
resetPassword.missingToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successSubtitle: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
